'''âw-th-f''' ('''kawathaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backpropagate|backpropagate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backpropagate|backpropagate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-th-f
|-
! Lemma
| kawathaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathaf|thiwathaf]] || [[word:jiwathaf|jiwathaf]] || [[word:shiwathaf|shiwathaf]] || [[word:kiwathaf|kiwathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathaf|thuthuwathaf]] || [[word:jujuwathaf|jujuwathaf]] || [[word:shushuwathaf|shushuwathaf]] || [[word:kukuwathaf|kukuwathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathaf|thuwathaf]] || [[word:juwathaf|juwathaf]] || [[word:shuwathaf|shuwathaf]] || [[word:kuwathaf|kuwathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathaf|thuwathaf]] || [[word:juwathaf|juwathaf]] || [[word:shuwathaf|shuwathaf]] || [[word:kuwathaf|kuwathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathaf|thewathaf]] || [[word:jewathaf|jewathaf]] || [[word:shewathaf|shewathaf]] || [[word:kewathaf|kewathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathaf|thothowathaf]] || [[word:jojowathaf|jojowathaf]] || [[word:shoshowathaf|shoshowathaf]] || [[word:kokowathaf|kokowathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathaf|thowathaf]] || [[word:jowathaf|jowathaf]] || [[word:showathaf|showathaf]] || [[word:kowathaf|kowathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathaf|thowathaf]] || [[word:jowathaf|jowathaf]] || [[word:showathaf|showathaf]] || [[word:kowathaf|kowathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwathaf|thĂŠwathaf]] || [[word:jĂŠwathaf|jĂŠwathaf]] || [[word:shĂŠwathaf|shĂŠwathaf]] || [[word:kĂŠwathaf|kĂŠwathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathaf|thathawathaf]] || [[word:jajawathaf|jajawathaf]] || [[word:shashawathaf|shashawathaf]] || [[word:kakawathaf|kakawathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathaf|thawathaf]] || [[word:jawathaf|jawathaf]] || [[word:shawathaf|shawathaf]] || [[word:kawathaf|kawathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathaf|thawathaf]] || [[word:jawathaf|jawathaf]] || [[word:shawathaf|shawathaf]] || [[word:kawathaf|kawathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawathaf|shawathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawathaf|goshawathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawathaf|gokishawathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawathafnĂŒ|shawathafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawathafnknĂŒ|goshawathafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathafnĂŒ|gokishawathafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawathafshĂ«|shawathafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawathafnkshĂ«|goshawathafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawathafshĂ«|gokishawathafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathafro|shawathafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathafnkro|goshawathafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathafro|gokishawathafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathafmu|shawathafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathafnkmu|goshawathafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathafmu|gokishawathafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawathafsher|shawathafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawathafnksher|goshawathafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawathafsher|gokishawathafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawathafng|shawathafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawathafnkng|goshawathafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawathafng|gokishawathafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawathafya|shawathafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawathafnkya|goshawathafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawathafya|gokishawathafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawathafyam|shawathafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawathafnkyam|goshawathafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawathafyam|gokishawathafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathafnĂŒshĂ«|shawathafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawathafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawathafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathafnĂŒro|shawathafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathafnknĂŒro|goshawathafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathafnĂŒro|gokishawathafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathafnĂŒmu|shawathafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathafnknĂŒmu|goshawathafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathafnĂŒmu|gokishawathafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathafshĂ«nĂŒ|shawathafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawathafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawathafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathafshĂ«ro|shawathafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathafnkshĂ«ro|goshawathafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathafshĂ«ro|gokishawathafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathafshĂ«mu|shawathafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathafnkshĂ«mu|goshawathafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathafshĂ«mu|gokishawathafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathafronĂŒ|shawathafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathafnkronĂŒ|goshawathafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathafronĂŒ|gokishawathafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathafroshĂ«|shawathafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathafnkroshĂ«|goshawathafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathafroshĂ«|gokishawathafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathafromu|shawathafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathafnkromu|goshawathafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathafromu|gokishawathafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathafmunĂŒ|shawathafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathafnkmunĂŒ|goshawathafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathafmunĂŒ|gokishawathafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathafmushĂ«|shawathafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathafnkmushĂ«|goshawathafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathafmushĂ«|gokishawathafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathafmuro|shawathafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathafnkmuro|goshawathafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathafmuro|gokishawathafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
